nasb.text: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada answered the king and said, “Amen! Thus may the Lord, the God of my lord the king, say.

esv.text: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada answered the king, “Amen! May the Lord, the God of my lord the king, say so.

cnv.text: 耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅回答王說：“阿們！願耶和華我主我王的　神也是這樣說。

ccb.text: 耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅说：“遵命，愿我主我王的上帝耶和华成全这事。
